# RestrictionsResponse.ErrorChainItem

**Device Management Command**

A dictionary that describes an error chain item.

## Declaration

```swift
object RestrictionsResponse.ErrorChainItem
```

## Objects

- **RestrictionsResponse.GlobalRestrictions**: A dictionary that contains the global restrictions in effect.
- **RestrictionsResponse.ProfileRestrictions**: A dictionary that contains restrictions from each profile.

items.description: A dictionary that contains the global restrictions in effect.
